SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-15-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHAN, ALEX WAI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PARTHASARATHY, MUKUNDAN THE ENTRUST GROUP INC FBO MUKUNDAN PARTHASARATHY $1,711.91 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,801.91 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
